title: [DFG optimization pass] Internal error on out-of-range slice

features.name: out_of_range_bit_slice_on_packed_struct_member
features.description: Code should include a bit-slice operation on a packed struct member where the slice indices exceed the member's actual width, causing Verilator's DFG optimization to fail internally

features.name: bit_slice_with_variable_range_exceeding_width
features.description: Code should include a bit-slice selection where the slice range (MSB:LSB) is larger than the source signal width, triggering a selection index out of range warning and internal error
